_instructions: Copy the entry object below and paste it into the 'entries' array in content.json. Fill in all fields. For images, drop files into assets/images/[id]/ named 01.jpg, 02.jpg, 03.jpg. For reports, drop PDFs into assets/reports/ and set the 'report' field. Leave 'report' as '' if none. In 'results', wrap key numbers/metrics in ... to highlight them in accent color.

entry_template.title: PROJECT TITLE IN UPPERCASE
entry_template.category: ROBOTICS | RESEARCH | DESIGN | AEROSPACE | (or any short label)
what: What was the goal or problem being solved?
What system or artifact was built/investigated?
how: What methods, tools, or techniques were used?
Any specific models, software, or fabrication approaches?
results: What was achieved? Use numbers where possible.
Key findings, performance metrics, or outcomes.

image_guide.note: If fewer than 3 images exist, missing slots render as placeholders automatically.

report_guide.note: Set the 'report' field in the entry to the path, e.g. 'assets/reports/afpel-cfd.pdf'. Leave as '' to hide the button.
